## Checklist

- [ ] `.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] If a vendored file changed: the edit traces to a PORTING.md rule (cite it)
- [ ] If user-visible: CHANGELOG.md Unreleased section updated
- [ ] No version bumps (maintainers handle releases)
